title: UI bug in app playground

posts.author: darkmift (Avi Koenig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,
I want to say the sandbox is an AMAZING tool in exploring and composing my queries.

mondaybug1323×182 16.6 KB

I am attaching here a screenshot showing a minor css bug where in use cases like my own where I want a bit nuts with the amount of queries a scroll bar appears and then using it is a bit hard as the querybuilder window overlaps a bit with its position.

Here’s a proposed fix:

fix1782×155 25 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
GitHub - graphql/graphiql: GraphiQL & the GraphQL LSP Reference Ecosystem for building browser & IDE tools. is the project they are using, which I don’t think they have heavily modified.

Just pointing this out because its very possible this is an upstream issue - especially since i can reproduce it in their live demo: SWAPI GraphQL API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

I have shared this with our team!

Thank you for bringing it

Cheers,
Matias
